summary: Backend regression + new tests for POST /api/sales card_fee_pct override. Added 5 targeted tests covering all override scenarios. 40/40 tests passed (35 regression + 5 new).
critical_code_review_comments: compute_sale correctly uses `if payload.card_fee_pct is not None` distinguishing 0 from None. Verified working.

Override on non-card methods (PIX/Dinheiro) applies fee BUT receive_date logic still ties to pm.is_card (sale_date for non-card). This is acceptable since manual override pertains only to the fee % - documented behavior.
Suggestion: Consider validating card_fee_pct range (e.g., 0 <= fee_pct <= 100) at API layer to prevent absurd values. Currently any float is accepted.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_* prefixed sales/products and clean up after each test. Default payment methods (Dinheiro, PIX, Cartão Débito 1.99%, Cartão Crédito 3.99%) are auto-seeded by backend startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New TestSalesFeeOverride class covers: (1) override 5.5% on Cartão Crédito; (2) no override -> default 3.99%; (3) override 0% does NOT fall back (key 'is not None' check); (4) override 2% on PIX (non-card) still applied; (5) override on Cartão Débito 4.25% replaces 1.99% and receive_date still +30d since pm.is_card=True. All 40 backend tests pass in ~5.4s.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - feature implementation verified working correctly. card_fee_pct override flow: SaleCreate accepts optional float; compute_sale checks `is not None` to distinguish explicit 0 from missing field; fallback to payment method default only when None.
